label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question. It asks what the dance project aims to do. The options are: A) give the street children parental care B) provide scholarship for the street children C) help the street children receive some education D) keep the street children in good health I need to find the answer in the passage. First, the main points of the passage: LaMar Baylor and Rebecca Davis teach ballet to street children in Rwanda. These children have lost their families, some have been in prison or sold their bodies. The dance classes provide structured learning and self-expression they didn't have before. The project is by the Rebecca Davis Dance Company. The goal seems to be using dance to help them move towards education, as mentioned when Rebecca says learning to dance is a step toward education. They can take IT classes after learning to attend classes and follow directions. Also, the best boys get scholarships to a boarding school. Now, looking at the options: A) Parental care isn't mentioned. The project doesn't mention providing parents, just dance and education. B) Scholarships are part of the process, but not the aim. The scholarships are a result of doing well in the classes, but the main aim is broader than just providing scholarships. C) Help receive education. The passage says dance is a step toward education.
